MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter.

RULING: The tentative ruling is adopted. PLAINTIFFS JOSEPH ABUZAID and FLAGS & THINGS ENTERPRISES, INC.'s Motion For Order Continuing Plaintiffs' Response To The Court'S OSC is Denied. The motion was not timely filed per Code of Civil Procedure section 1005(b). Further, no proof of service was filed. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.)
